name: @executioncontextprotocol/workspace
description: Execution Control Protocol (ECP) — open specification for defining, packaging, versioning, and deploying AI agent environments

scripts.clean: node scripts/clean-dist.mjs && tsc -b packages/spec packages/plugins packages/recalled packages/runtime packages/cli --clean
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -b packages/spec packages/plugins packages/recalled packages/runtime packages/cli && npm run generate:schema --workspace=@executioncontrolprotocol/spec && npm run build:examples
scripts.build:examples: cd examples/third-party-provider-plugin && npm install --ignore-scripts && npx tsc
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
